stories.headline: A taxing issue
stories.summary: Fifteen years after an investigation into racial disparities in Long Island's property taxes, Newsday revisits the topic, finding persistent systemic issues. A shift to market value assessments is spurred by fiscal pressures.

stories.headline: Death and dollars
stories.summary: The Charlotte Observer investigated deaths in North Carolina mental health facilities by analyzing death certificate data, uncovering a lack of oversight that allowed dangerous trends and negligent caregiving to go undetected in both public and private psychiatric institutions.
